title: S&R Sanding Discs Set Ø225mm - 10pcs Professional Abrasive Discs for Random Orbital Sanders, Commercial Quality (P240 Grit)
features: 🛠️ Versatile Sanding Solutions: Elevate your sanding experience with the S&R Sanding Discs Set. Designed for random orbital sanders, these professional-grade abrasive discs are perfect for commercial use.

🛠️ Premium Quality, Ultimate Flexibility: Each set includes 10 sheets of high-quality sand grinding wheels, offering flexibility for a variety of sanding tasks. Ideal for achieving smooth surfaces with ease.

🛠️ Perfect Fit for Various Sanders: Tailored for long-neck sanders, drywall sanders, telescopic sanders, Planex, or ceiling sanders with a Ø225mm size. This set is crafted to meet the demands of diverse sanding applications.

🛠️ Enhanced Sanding Performance: The sanding paper in this set is thoughtfully selected to ensure efficient material removal and a superior finish. Experience the difference in performance with S&R's professional abrasive discs.

🛠️ Commercial-Grade Durability: Built for durability and longevity, these sanding discs are ready to tackle challenging projects. Whether you're a professional or DIY enthusiast, this set is your reliable partner in achieving precise and smooth results.
description: Product Description Why Choose S&R Sanding Discs? Professional Quality & Flexible Sanding Solutions Set of 10 high-quality abrasive discs. Diameter: 225 mm for efficient coverage. Suitable for long-handled sanders, drywall sanders, telescopic sanders, Planex, or ceiling sanders. Versatile use for various sanding applications. Reliable Performance & User-Friendly Design Flexible yet durable design for reliable and consistent results. Ideal for professionals and DIY enthusiasts alike. 8 holes for efficient dust extraction, maintaining a clean workspace. Velcro fastener for easy and secure mounting.
